title: athyrium costulalisorum
intro: Athyrium costulalisorum, commonly known as the spiny lady fern, is a type of flowering plant in the fern family (Athyriaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Athyrium costulalisorum include its ability to reduce pain, inflammation, and improve immune function, making it a potential treatment for various ailments such as arthritis and wounds. Athyrium costulalisorum can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
